productName: Full Spec - Afterburners Live Resin Infused Preroll - 2pk 0.75g - (HS) Squeaky Clean
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Squeaky Clean and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
